description_for_human: Professional SEO/GEO website auditor skill evaluating LLM citation readiness, technical accessibility, and semantic authority.
description_for_model: Use this skill to audit any target domain's visibility, technical crawlability, and semantic authority under conversational AI models (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, Google AI Overviews). It calculates a baseline score based on technical access, schemas, sitemaps, BLUF paragraph format, and off-page entities. Can also verify live engine indexation via E2E checks.
